tasks.label: 🚀 Install: Full stack setup
tasks.detail: Run setup.sh - installs brew packages, pulls Ollama models, starts services

tasks.label: 🩺 Status: Check all services
tasks.detail: Quick health check of Ollama, Qdrant, Redis, Postgres, and project config

tasks.label: 🐘 Postgres: Setup (create db and user)
tasks.command: psql postgres -c "CREATE USER qms_agent WITH PASSWORD 'changeme';" -c "CREATE DATABASE qms_agent OWNER qms_agent;" -c "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE qms_agent TO qms_agent;"
tasks.detail: Create the qms_agent database and user. Run once. Update POSTGRES_PASSWORD in .env to match.

tasks.label: 🐘 Postgres: Start service
tasks.detail: Start the Postgres service via brew

tasks.label: 🐘 Postgres: Open psql
tasks.detail: Open a psql shell to the qms_agent database

tasks.label: 💾 Drizzle: Run migrations
tasks.detail: Apply pending migrations to the Postgres database

tasks.label: 💾 Drizzle: Generate migration
tasks.detail: Generate a new migration from changes in src/db/schema.ts

tasks.label: 💾 Drizzle: Open Studio
tasks.detail: Open the Drizzle Studio browser-based schema inspector

tasks.label: 🧪 Smoke: Test data plane
tasks.detail: Verify tiers, services, query records, and database all work end-to-end

tasks.label: 🧪 Smoke: Test auth
tasks.detail: Verify password hashing, JWT, user CRUD, and refresh token storage

tasks.label: 🧪 Smoke: Test agent
tasks.detail: Run the agent graph end-to-end without HTTP. Prompts for a question.

tasks.label: 🧪 Smoke: Test tables (structured data)
tasks.detail: Verify type inference, SQL load, registry, and the structured query builder end-to-end

tasks.label: 🔐 Auth: Create admin user
tasks.detail: Interactive prompt to bootstrap the first admin user

tasks.label: 🌐 API: Start server
tasks.detail: Start the Express API server on port 4000

tasks.label: 📥 Ingest: From QMS git repo
tasks.detail: Fetch QMS docs from the git repo in ingestion.json, convert, chunk, load into Qdrant

tasks.label: 📥 Ingest: From local QMS_FOLDER
tasks.detail: Ingest from the local folder specified by QMS_FOLDER in .env

tasks.label: 🧹 Clear: Qdrant collection
tasks.detail: Drop and recreate the qms_documents collection (asks for confirmation)

tasks.label: 🔄 Reingest: Clear + ingest from git
tasks.command: npm run reset -- --yes && npm run ingest:repo
tasks.detail: Clear the collection (no confirmation) and re-ingest from the git repo. For the iterate cycle.

tasks.label: 🔄 Reingest: Clear + ingest from local
tasks.command: npm run reset -- --yes && npm run ingest
tasks.detail: Clear the collection (no confirmation) and re-ingest from the local QMS_FOLDER

tasks.label: 🔍 Test: Retrieval
tasks.detail: Run a semantic search against the qms_documents collection

tasks.label: 💬 Ask: Query the RAG
tasks.detail: Send a question to the RAG and get an answer with citations

tasks.label: 🌐 Open: Qdrant dashboard
tasks.detail: Open the Qdrant web UI in your browser

tasks.label: 🤖 Agent: Run draft
tasks.detail: Run the drafting agent (currently smoke test - will become real agent)

tasks.label: 🛑 Teardown: Stop services (keep data)
tasks.detail: Stop Ollama, Redis, Postgres, Colima, and Qdrant. Data preserved.

tasks.label: 💥 Teardown: Purge all data
tasks.detail: Stop services AND delete all data. Asks for confirmation.

inputs.description: Search query to test against the QMS collection
inputs.default: what is required for software safety classification
what are the columns in the risk register

inputs.description: Question to send to the agent
inputs.default: what are the columns in the risk register
